text:
Intervention This field indicates whether the patient/caregiver was instructed by agency staff or other health care provider to monitor the effectiveness of drug therapy, drug reactions and side effects. 00 = No
01 = Yes
NA = Patient not taking any drugs CHAR 2 x x x
M2020_CRNT_MGMT_ORAL_MDCTN M2020 Current Management Of Oral Medications This field indicates the patient's current ability to prepare and take all oral medications reliably and safely. 00 = Able to independently take the correct
